articles.title: Waymo's Driverless Cars Are 'Backsliding' — Blocking Fire Trucks and Ignoring Police
articles.summary: Emergency officials from San Francisco and Austin told federal regulators that Waymo's autonomous vehicles are freezing up more often, blocking fire stations, and failing to respond to hand signals. One 911 call to Waymo's hotline took 53 minutes to answer.

articles.title: The Hoverair X1 Promax: A Pocket-Sized Drone That Shoots 8K and Survives Crashes
articles.summary: The Hoverair X1 Promax is a foldable, sub-200-gram drone with 15 pre-programmed flight modes and 8K video. Its durable, flexible frame shrugs off crashes, making it ideal for beginners who want cinematic shots without the stress.

articles.title: MIT and IBM Launch Joint Lab to Pioneer AI-Quantum Hybrid Computing
articles.summary: The new MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab will focus on AI, algorithms, and quantum computing, aiming to create hybrid systems that surpass classical limits. Building on a decade of collaboration, it has already involved 150+ MIT faculty and funded over 500 students.
